# Procs panel collapse/expand flow.
#
# Walks the cursor onto feat/auth (the worktree with the heavy fixture
# proc list), captures the collapsed view, presses P to expand, captures
# the expanded view, presses P again to collapse, and captures once more.
#
# What this catches:
#   - collapsed.txt must show ranked top 5 + "+9 more (P)" hint
#   - expanded.txt must show every proc, no "more" line
#   - recollapsed.txt must match collapsed.txt

width 140
height 40

# Let initial aggregator snapshots settle.
resolve
wait 200ms

# Focus feat/auth (the heavy-procs worktree). Two j moves down from the
# default first row; demo fixture ordering is stable across runs.
keys jj
resolve

capture /tmp/canopy_procs_collapsed.txt

# Expand.
keys P
resolve

capture /tmp/canopy_procs_expanded.txt

# Collapse again.
keys P
resolve

capture /tmp/canopy_procs_recollapsed.txt
